reviews.review_description: Lag ruins what could have been a wonderful game. Still fun even with the lag but a racing game needs to be smooth. If I was playing this game on pc I would simply turn all graphics settings down to minimum to play the game properly but its a quest game so not possible...disappointing.

I absolutely love this game the only issue that I have, is that it has been glitching here and there.. periodically, my boosters will not work, so I have to exit the game and re-enter. I also just had an instance wherejust now where the ship was glitching, acting ss if I was being ran into, over and over, when there were no other ships. These things are rare, but notable.. If these issues are fixed, it is a 5 star game!

If you enjoy this game, I'd recommend Omega Pilot (somewhat similar and very unique racing experience) also, Echo Drift *retro hover car* (DEMO) and DRFT *normal cars*

developer_response.body:
Thanks!

Ill fix these issues as soon as possible, though them being rare might make that difficult to do quickly :(

reviews.review_description: Only criticism I have is the title of the game lol. The title should have “PodRacing” in it. Just my opinion… I bet that would get a lot more attention from people surfing the store though.

reviews.review_title: This dev did what Starwars Beyond didn't
reviews.review_description: Starwars: Beyond Victory gave us a third person table top pod racer because they played it safe not wanting to made a product that wouldn't only appeal to veteran VR users. This dev thought otherwise, and solid it ridiculously cheap. Excellent work, 5 stars

Dart Racer is an impressive early access futuristic pod racing game with a truly revolutionary handling system. Clearly inspired by the iconic podracers of Star Wars Episode I (with a nod to Anakin), it combines nostalgia with fresh mechanics that stand on their own.

The game offers a wide range of modes — from cup races à la Mario Kart to elimination, time trials, and first-to-finish competitions. On top of that, the sheer amount of customization is overwhelming, letting you fine-tune your racer to perfection. With QGO (Quest Game Optimizer) now supporting it, the HD+ profile looks absolutely stunning.

It takes a few rounds to really master the controls, but once you do, piloting your Dart feels like precision science — smooth, sharp, and incredibly satisfying. The gameplay evokes memories of Wipeout VR while creating its own strong footprint in the genre.

This game feels like a true labor of love from the developer, packed with content and passion. Already a ton of fun, with huge potential ahead. Highly recommended!

reviews.review_title: I've Needed This Game For So Long
reviews.review_description:
I had absolutely loved the dickens out of the demo and played it lots. It is my childhood dream come true; I’ve always loved podracing and this is the closest and best experience I’ve ever had. Genuinely cried the first time I played it.

If you are a speed junkie, or love sci-fi racers, I highly, HIGHLY recommend you support these guys.
Awesome game and alot of fun! Really hoping to see more development in the way of new tracks and different racer customizations but overall a great start and am having heaps of fun!

developer_response.body: More environments, tracks and Darts are coming!

reviews.review_description: After I figured out how to steer (grab the bottom handles and rotate your controllers), I got some really fun experiences out of the current Early Access build. It’s still very early, but you really can see the potential of this game in the future. Loved the Star Wars pod-racing game as a child, and this definitely scratched that itch.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the kind words!

reviews.review_description: The unique control scheme really challenges you to study the mechanics and tinker with your approach. With many ways to reach the top of the leaderboards, you'll find yourself chasing the advantage of a fraction of a second in any way possible. The breadth of courses range from wide planetscapes to tight city levels with endless chasms and secret paths. Once you start, you cannot put down this perfect arcade racer.
Not hard to drive.  Hope one day it will go multiplayer
Great balls of fire! NEEDS MULTIPLAYER. X the players; Y the fun. That's an equation.
